title: Monitoringthepriceofbitcoinminingrigstopredictthefuturedirectionofthecryptocurrencymarket
thesis: The price of used bitcoin mining rigs can signal changes in the profitability of mining, which in turn can predict future bitcoin price movements. The technology sector is closely tied to the performance of cryptocurrencies and blockchain-related assets.
data_sources: Online marketplaces like eBay and Craigslist
signal_logic: If the 7-day average price of used mining rigs increases by more than 10% in a week
entry_exit: Entry: If the 7-day average price of used mining rigs increases by more than 10% in a week Exit: After 14 trading days or if the 7-day average price stops rising
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Online marketplaces like eBay and Craigslist via scrape (daily).

schema.idea: Monitoring the price of bitcoin mining rigs to predict the future direction of the cryptocurrency market

data.source: Online marketplaces like eBay and Craigslist

schema.behavior: The price of used bitcoin mining rigs can signal changes in the profitability of mining, which in turn can predict future bitcoin price movements.

market_impact.rationale: The technology sector is closely tied to the performance of cryptocurrencies and blockchain-related assets.

trade_logic.entry: If the 7-day average price of used mining rigs increases by more than 10% in a week
trade_logic.exit: After 14 trading days or if the 7-day average price stops rising
